schema_note: This sheet's 'ST1'/'ST2' marks are STAIR nosing/riser rebar details (บันได), unrelated to spec section 10's slab-marker taxonomy (SO/SI/SX/ST) despite sharing the 'ST' prefix -- do not confuse with a slab element. Recorded here as separate stair_detail entries, not element_type:slab.

warnings: The หลังคา (roof) and อะเส (tie beam) rows of the column schedule appear to be mostly blank cells or upward-arrow symbols (meaning 'same as below') rather than distinct rebar specs -- this needs a human zoom review to confirm, since it directly affects whether C1/C1A columns have any additional reinforcement above the ตอม่อ/ฐานราก level.
ST1/ST2 stair details and the RC fin detail were read at small scale (1:20) with several overlapping dimension lines -- flagged for human review rather than asserted with high confidence.
